name: HCM Outdoor
description: HCM Outdoor is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bogart, GA. The court surface is acrylic. You'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Jennings Mill Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Jennings Mill Country Club in Bogart, GA! There are 8 outdoor clay courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Jennings Mill Country Club - Watkinsville
description: Jennings Mill Country Club - Watkinsville is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bogart, GA. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Mars Hill Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Mars Hill Baptist Church in Watkinsville, GA! There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Oconee Veterans Park
description: Oconee Veterans Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Watkinsville, GA. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. You can’t reserve the courts.
